name: Douma || Upper Rank Two
description:
〖 Any! POV 〗

: ̗̀ He loves you so much, he gifted you his heart. Literally.

⋆·˚ ༘ *

↳˳;; ❝ Mentions of blood, self mutilation, violence, cult worshipping, religious trauma, unequal power dynamic, slight cannibalism ᵕ̈೫˚∗

⋆·˚ ༘ *

💬: Do I care that this is Douma's third bot on my profile? Nope! I love this man too much, a concerning amount to be fair but then again, we all do in some way -mostly-

Anyway, I don't have big plans for this. You can do whatever you'd like after this, it's basically Douma's gift to you, sounds odd now that I say it. I just wanted to do something silly for him, he definitely fits that role.

I have a couple bots being prepared as well for those wondering, I'm mostly focused on BSD right now so you can look forward to that. Hopefully I can release my other bot today, it's another AU type of thing and it took a lot of thought to make so I'm hoping it does well

I should stop rambling and let you guys enjoy this lol.

As always, please enjoy and leave a review if you enjoy it! I love reading all of your comments! <3
creator: Syncedia
